targetDevice.name: LM3S6965
targetDevice.notes: Concrete MCU target selected to match the QEMU lm3s6965evb machine supported by the user's WSL2 QEMU 11.0.50. Board- and QEMU-level sources are included only to anchor the requested evaluation-board model to this MCU and to constrain emulated coverage; MCU silicon facts still come from TI and Arm primary sources.

sources.notes: Official TI landing page for the exact MCU. Used to anchor current vendor ownership and the primary TI documentation set.
Primary TI source for device identity, memory capacities, peripheral inventory, memory map, and MCU-specific structural facts.
Official Arm Cortex-M3 technical reference manual for CPU-core-owned facts including NVIC and SysTick behavior and register definitions.
Official TI Stellaris Peripheral Driver Library package page. TI explicitly states this package includes per-device headers for direct register access.
Official TI Driver Library user's guide covering direct-register and driver-model usage for GPIO, UART, SSI, I2C, timers, flash, watchdog, and related peripheral-control semantics.
Official TI evaluation-board user's manual used only to anchor the requested LM3S6965EVB/QEMU board target to the LM3S6965 MCU and associated board context.
Official TI errata for the relevant Stellaris LM3S device class. Used to challenge unsupported or contradicted silicon claims during extraction.

Community-accessible mirror of an LM3S6965 CMSIS device header. Included as a gap-filler because the official TI SDK is legacy-packaged, while this file is directly consumable and contains IRQ and register definitions useful for cross-checking extraction.

Community-accessible mirror of TI's legacy DriverLib GPIO hardware header with register offsets and bit-field masks. Approved as a field-level gap-filler because the official TI package is legacy-gated.
Community-accessible mirror of TI's legacy DriverLib System Control hardware header with register addresses and bit-field masks for clocking, resets, and capability registers.
Community-accessible mirror of TI's legacy DriverLib UART hardware header with register offsets and field masks.
Community-accessible mirror of TI's legacy DriverLib SSI hardware header with register offsets and field masks.
Community-accessible mirror of TI's legacy DriverLib I2C hardware header with register offsets and field masks.
Community-accessible mirror of TI's legacy DriverLib GPTM timer hardware header with register offsets and field masks.
Community-accessible mirror of TI's legacy DriverLib watchdog hardware header with register offsets and field masks.
Community-accessible mirror of TI's legacy DriverLib NVIC hardware header with register offsets and interrupt-control field masks.

Official QEMU documentation confirming that the user's installed QEMU model lm3s6965evb targets a Stellaris LM3S6965EVB with Cortex-M3, 256 KB flash, 64 KB SRAM, and timers/UART/ADC/I2C/SSI coverage. Use only to constrain emulator-target alignment, not as silicon authority.
